creator: goksin.akdeniz@gmail.com
text:
sysutils/smartmontools port does not compile due to a sha256sum mismatch. Port's SHA256sum is given below:

SHA256 (smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz) = b664d11e814e114ce3a32a4fa918c9e649c684e2897c007b2a8b92574decc374

smarmontools5.42.tar.gz sha256sum is given below:

SHA256 (smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz) = ad0fadd79d3b1405a5933a5046802d20f5db68f5a874455e795d7539fba4ceb1

How-To-Repeat: Either run portupgrade to upgrade port or install the ports
